## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** N/A (watcher-only, no live trades)
2. **Sample bias:** 22 OPRA cases from 2025-2026; OR-range < 2.00 is regime-selective
3. **Out-of-sample:** WF PASS (OOS/IS = 0.667, deduped N=32)

5. **Failure modes:** Wide ORB days (>2.00) not covered by this gate; bull ORB not included
6. **Concentration:** Q2-2026 = 16% (deduped) — acceptable
